name: Batter Bread W/Pepperoni
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water.
2. Add the oil, sugar, salt, garlic powder, and oregano to the yeast mixture.
3. Gradually add 2 cups of flour to the yeast mixture with an electric mixer on low speed.
4. Increase the speed to medium and beat for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in the remaining flour and pepperoni.
6. Scrape the batter from the sides of the bowl.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place (80°F) until doubled in bulk (45 to 60 minutes).
8. Stir the batter and spread evenly in a greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan.
9. Cover and let rise until doubled (30 to 40 minutes).
10. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
11. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until the loaf sounds hollow when tapped.
12. Cool on a rack before slicing. Makes one 9 x 5-inch loaf.
